name: Kindergarten Spirit — Semester 2
description: An 18-week, play-based Kindergarten pathway for kindness, reflection, service, and respectful questions. Lessons are brief, hands-on, flexible, and designed for adult-guided learning.
learningGoals: Build confidence and curiosity with kindness, reflection, service, and respectful questions.
Communicate learning through talk, drawing, movement, play, or a simple creation.
Practice safe, kind, and responsible participation.

lessons.title: Notice and talk: kindness, reflection, service, and respectful questions
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about kindness, reflection, service, and respectful questions through a close look at kindness, reflection, service, and respectful questions.

lessons.title: Try it together: kindness, reflection, service, and respectful questions
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about kindness, reflection, service, and respectful questions through a guided practice with kindness, reflection, service, and respectful questions.

lessons.title: Make or show: kindness, reflection, service, and respectful questions
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about kindness, reflection, service, and respectful questions through a small creation or demonstration about kindness, reflection, service, and respectful questions.

resources.title: Family-directed, non-devotional pathway
resources.description: Planning reference for this Kindergarten Spirit pathway.

units.title: Wonder and notice: kindness, reflection, service, and respectful questions
units.essentialQuestion: What can we notice and wonder about kindness, reflection, service, and respectful questions?
outcomes: I can notice details and share a question about kindness, reflection, service, and respectful questions.
I can use words, pictures, movement, or materials to communicate my thinking.

lessons.title: Notice and talk: kindness, reflection, service, and respectful questions
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about kindness, reflection, service, and respectful questions through a close look at kindness, reflection, service, and respectful questions.

activities.title: A close look at kindness, reflection, service, and respectful questions
activities.learnerAction: With an adult or teacher nearby when needed, the learner participates in a close look at kindness, reflection, service, and respectful questions, uses words, pictures, movement, or materials to communicate thinking, and cleans up safely.

successCriteria: The learner participates safely and respectfully in kindness, reflection, service, and respectful questions.
The learner communicates one observation, choice, or question using speech, drawing, movement, or a supported response.
